title: armeria helodes
intro: Armeria helodes, also known as the Western thistle or Sea thistle, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the thistle family (Asteraceae) and is native to the western coast of North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Armeria helodes include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Armeria helodes can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction, and its leaves and flowers can be used in herbal preparations, such as salves and ointments, to treat various health conditions.
